title: MONOLITH I
description: A 4-meter brutalist concrete structure exploring structural isolation and sound resonance. Recorded in an abandoned power station in Berlin. The work investigates the interplay of industrial decay and permanent forms.

title: SUB-RESONANCE
description: Site-specific sound installation using low-frequency transducers mounted directly to raw steel beams. Visitors feel the structural vibrations of the architecture, translating the building's skeletal tension into tactile sound.

title: INDUSTRIAL DECAY II
description: A high-contrast, high-grain 35mm photographic series documenting the corrosion of decommissioned heavy machinery. Focused on the fine textures of oxidized iron and raw concrete.

title: VOID EXCLUSION
description: A 3-hour silent endurance performance where the artist stands in complete darkness inside a steel grid cage, illuminated only by a high-intensity strobe light synchronized to their heartbeat.
